title: Job Opening Teacher at NIIT Foundation

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at NIIT Foundation
jsonLd.description:
Join the NIIT Foundation family as a Teacher in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NIIT Foundation:
NIIT Foundation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
